reason: In a post-apocalyptic war, a soldier’s impossible choice defines his honor against a backdrop of human ruin.
An anthropologist in 1940s Java honors ancient vows under bombardment, forced to choose between duty and mercy.
A widowed preacher in frontier Wyoming must decide between saving his land or risking all for his principles.
A British officer at a Japanese POW camp must weigh obedience against humanity for his men’s survival.
A lawyer defending an altar boy rapist must confront his conscience under the threat of a ghastly execution.
An eccentric monk faces a moral crossroads when he must kill to protect the last white child found in sea wreckage.
A Black security chief uncovers corruption in his own precinct, torn between loyalty and reform.
A young man’s idealism wanes when forced to choose between insurrection or betrayal.
A nobleman torn by loyalty and love must decide whether to risk it all for justice or betray his cause.
The lone survivor of a prison ship crash must face a deadly virus outbreak and choose who to rescue first.
